metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins and skills.

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development workflow: codebase mapping, spec, plan, implement, review and debug skills that prove every requirement is built and tested. Priority-tagged requirements, evidence-or-zero coverage, a P0 mutation/discrimination sensor, blind multi-lens local code review with adversarial verification, and a self-improving lessons memory. Brownfield-first.

plugins.name: status-report
plugins.description: Generate a polished, leadership-ready status report (and optional enterprise action plan) for any fix, incident or in-flight change — styled for WhatsApp/email, interviewing you one question at a time when context is thin.

plugins.name: triage
plugins.description: Automated Jira triage pipeline: pull tasks from the boards you name, filter by size in three discarding gates, open a draft WIP PR on Bitbucket per surviving task with a plain-language summary, pause for your approval, then deliver the approved ones through the SDD TDD loop and flip the draft to Ready. Reuses the sdd plugin's plan/implement methods; nothing runs to completion without your checkpoint.

plugins.name: prs-review
plugins.description: Structured code review of one or more Pull Requests, Bitbucket and GitHub in the same batch. One subagent per PR (parallel, multi-repo) applies the sdd plugin's review doctrine — blind lenses plus adversarial verification — over the diff fetched via the matching MCP, and consolidates a single approved/rejected verdict with blockers, warnings and praise, written to a ClickUp-ready .txt.
